mqtt._comment: Mosquitto broker runs locally on the Raspberry Pi 4
mqtt._comment_topics: topic_data catches normal telemetry; topic_alert catches immediate alarm/cleared events from gas-capable nodes

snmpv3._comment: SNMPv3 authPriv — SHA authentication + AES-128 encryption

watchdog._comment: Heartbeat: if no message from a node within timeout_seconds, mark OFFLINE

thresholds._comment: Anomaly detection rules — violations trigger LEVEL_2/3 events

gas._comment: Gas ADC thresholds — raw 10-bit values from ESP8266 A0 (0–1023, Vref=3.3V). Applies only to nodes that carry an MQ-type gas sensor (sensor_type=DHT11+MQ2). gas_warning_high triggers a LEVEL_2 WARNING event; gas_critical_high triggers a LEVEL_3 CRITICAL event and an immediate SNMPv3 trap.
gas._comment_jump: gas_jump_adc: if gasValue changes by more than this between consecutive readings, treat as anomalous spike (sensor fault or sudden leak)

authorized_nodes._comment: Allowlist of node_id values the gateway will accept. Any message whose node_id is not in this list is rejected and logged as a LEVEL_3 CRITICAL security event (potential rogue device or misconfigured node). Add new nodes here before flashing their firmware.

nodes._comment: DHT11 on GPIO14 only. No MQ gas sensor fitted.
DHT11 on D5 + MQ gas sensor on A0. Gas thresholds apply.
Identical hardware to SEC_02. Same gas thresholds apply.

recovery._comment: Number of consecutive valid packets required before clearing FAULTY state
